BackstoryDef.title: Free cultivator alchemist
BackstoryDef.description: Although [PAWN_nameDef] had little experience in alchemy, [PAWN_pronoun] learned some knowledge of herb cultivation and healing through ancient books and years of exploration. [PAWN_nameDef] was originally a servant disciple in a small sect, and when the sect was destroyed, no one cared for [PAWN_pronoun], giving [PAWN_pronoun] the opportunity to escape.

BackstoryDef.title: Carefree independent cultivator
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a solitary cultivator, existing outside the sects. With [PAWN_possessive] intelligence and wit, [PAWN_nameDef] found a place in the cultivation world. Despite lacking the protection of a sect, [PAWN_nameDef] still maintains [PAWN_possessive] passion and pursuit of immortality. [PAWN_nameDef] believes that as long as [PAWN_possessive] perseverance endures, one day [PAWN_nameDef] will find [PAWN_possessive] own path.

BackstoryDef.title: Kind free cultivator
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s life was neither exceptionally prosperous nor miserably poor. [PAWN_pronoun] enjoyed a free and unrestrained lifestyle, refusing to be bound by any constraints. Whenever someone needed help, [PAWN_pronoun] was always willing to lend a hand.

BackstoryDef.title: People of the sea
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a survivor of a great tsunami, firmly believing [PAWN_pronoun] saw a strange figure amidst the massive waves. After recovering, [PAWN_pronoun] felt [PAWN_possessive] body had become extraordinarily strong.

BackstoryDef.title: Wasteland traveler
BackstoryDef.description: After arriving the wasteland, [PAWN_nameDef] wandered the wastelands. The ruthless law of the jungle sharpened [PAWN_pronoun] extensive combat skills and equipped [PAWN_pronoun] with exceptional wilderness survival techniques.

BackstoryDef.title: Sect survivor
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was originally a disciple in a small sect, essentially just doing menial tasks. Therefore, when the sect was destroyed, no one cared about [PAWN_possessive] life, allowing [PAWN_pronoun] to escape successfully.

BackstoryDef.title: Energy root poacher
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has been employed by an underground organization to poach Energy roots from free cultivators. Years of killing and surgical extraction have honed [PAWN_pronoun] skills in martial arts and medicine.

BackstoryDef.title: Occupy the soul
BackstoryDef.description: Due to [PAWN_nameDef]'s early mastery of soul magic, [PAWN_possessive] soul remained undying after death. [PAWN_nameDef] found a suitable body and successfully performed a soul possession.

BackstoryDef.title: Exiled evil cultivator
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is someone being hunted by various powerful factions, and from a distance, one can smell the bloodlust that emanates from [PAWN_possessive] very bones.

BackstoryDef.title: Deeply consumed in evil
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is an evil rogue cultivator, making a living by murder and pillaging. Cold and ruthless, [PAWN_nameDef] believes that only the strong can survive. [PAWN_nameDef] constantly improves [PAWN_possessive] cultivation, swearing to reach the peak of the cultivation world. When [PAWN_nameDef]’s name is mentioned, it strikes fear into the hearts of all.

BackstoryDef.title: Hidden in the Darkness
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] excelled in stealth and assassination, often appearing under the cover of night to hunt lone cultivators. [PAWN_pronoun] methods were brutal, frequently leaving no remains of the victims. Despite this, [PAWN_pronoun] was never caught, moving like a phantom—silent, invisible, and untraceable.

BackstoryDef.title: Immortals slayer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was originally an ordinary person with a happy family. On one Lantern Festival, [PAWN_nameDef] planned to give gifts to [PAWN_possessive] wife and daughter, but unexpectedly, [PAWN_nameDef]'s family perished in a fire caused by a battle between immortals.In a fit of rage, [PAWN_nameDef] killed an immortal at the Dan Transformation stage. Three quarters of the hour later, rainwater streamed down [PAWN_possessive] cheek, making it impossible to tell whether [PAWN_pronoun] was crying, but the vicious expression on [PAWN_possessive] face spoke volumes."Long time no see, I am the immortal slayer."

BackstoryDef.title: Immortal peach tycoon
BackstoryDef.description: After leaving [PAWN_nameDef]'s master, [PAWN_nameDef] suffered greatly in order to make a living. Eventually, [PAWN_nameDef] turned to a life of crime, becoming wealthy by selling counterfeit goods.

BackstoryDef.title: Fallen genius
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was once a genius in the sect, but after losing [PAWN_possessive] spiritual bud in a martial arts competition, [PAWN_possessive] cultivation was lost, and [PAWN_nameDef] was abandoned by the sect. Just as [PAWN_nameDef] was about to fall into despair, [PAWN_possessive] childhood sweetheart, [PAWN_possessive] junior sister, stole the spiritual bud to save [PAWN_nameDef]. However, she was killed by the sect elders during the transfer. Carrying the hope and unwillingness of [PAWN_possessive] junior sister, [PAWN_nameDef] began a life of wandering.

BackstoryDef.title: Great-love immorals
BackstoryDef.description: Under the righteous sect's siege, the Great Love Immortal [PAWN_nameDef] was forced to self-destruct and reincarnate with a rebirth worm. [PAWN_nameDef] was reborn into the body of a young man in the marginal world. Quickly adapting to the new environment, [PAWN_nameDef] concealed [PAWN_possessive] identity, secretly cultivated, and sought opportunities to increase [PAWN_possessive] strength.In the marginal world, [PAWN_nameDef] discovered that the cultivation system here was completely different from [PAWN_possessive] original world. [PAWN_nameDef] began to explore the spiritual energy and methods of this world, searching for rare herbs and magical artifacts, refining pills with various effects. Using [PAWN_possessive] wisdom and experience, [PAWN_nameDef] gradually made a name for [PAWN_possessive] self in this world.Despite being in a foreign realm, [PAWN_nameDef] remained determined to pursue immortality. Cold-hearted and ruthless, [PAWN_nameDef] viewed human life as worthless. As long as there were benefits to be gained, [PAWN_nameDef] would not hesitate to take action. Relying on [PAWN_possessive] past life’s memories and experiences, [PAWN_nameDef] quickly rose in the marginal world, becoming a terrifying figure. When asked why [PAWN_possessive] didn’t choose another way of living, [PAWN_nameDef] left only a verse: “Fate is predestined, in my destiny's defeat, the Immortal regrets but I do not!”

BackstoryDef.title: Immortal in wine
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was known as the "Immortal of Wine." He was once an ambitious cultivator, pursuing immortality alongside [PAWN_possessive] Dao companion. However, fate was cruel, and [PAWN_possessive] Dao companion tragically perished in a conflict. Devastated, [PAWN_nameDef] swore to avenge [PAWN_possessive] companion. After years of hard cultivation, [PAWN_nameDef] finally avenged [PAWN_possessive] fallen companion.After completing the revenge, [PAWN_nameDef] felt an emptiness in [PAWN_possessive] heart and no longer engaged in matters of the immortal realm. [PAWN_nameDef] retreated into the mountains, focusing on cultivating rice and brewing fine wine. Every quiet night, [PAWN_nameDef] would drink alone, reminiscing about the beautiful moments shared with [PAWN_possessive] Dao companion."Unfeeling time urges relentlessly, the limited moments never return. Life is seldom drunk, regardless of right or wrong."

BackstoryDef.title: Red-faced demon
BackstoryDef.description: Due to [PAWN_nameDef]'s traumatic childhood, [PAWN_pronoun] joined the Da Li Temple to cultivate. During a journey down the mountain to gain experience, [PAWN_pronoun] was asked five thousand times why [PAWN_pronoun] wasn’t a monk. Embarrassed and enraged, [PAWN_pronoun] unleashed a barrage of five thousand slaps, wreaking havoc and causing widespread devastation. Having caused a death, [PAWN_pronoun] fled in panic, accidentally boarding a passing colony ship that took [PAWN_pronoun] to an unknown RimWorld.

BackstoryDef.title: Corpse collector
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was once a general who defended the homeland, renowned for [PAWN_possessive] military prowess. In one battle, [PAWN_pronoun] led [PAWN_possessive] troops to annihilate an entire enemy force. However, when [PAWN_pronoun] hurried to escort the captured evil cultivators back, the fleeing evildoers made an offering to a dark transcendent intelligence with the unburied corpses from the battlefield. The flesh-eating beasts devoured the capital, leaving only the general alive.[PAWN_nameDef] turned gray overnight. Alone, [PAWN_pronoun] set out on a path of vengeance, slaying all the evil cultivators in three days. Yet, after the revenge, [PAWN_pronoun] was left with nothing but an endless emptiness and sorrow in [PAWN_pronoun] heart.In order to give peace to the souls of the fallen people, [PAWN_nameDef] decided to return to the homeland and gather the scattered bodies from the wilderness. Every day, [PAWN_pronoun] walked through the desolation, silently finding a resting place for each body, preserving the last dignity of the people."How can one conquer all armies yet exchange it for countless solitary graves?"

BackstoryDef.title: Healthy sect cultivator
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into a local family of cultivators. From a young age, [PAWN_pronoun] was well-regarded by the family due to [PAWN_pronoun] natural talent and grew up healthy, eventually becoming a member of the sect.

BackstoryDef.title: Outstanding Sect Cultivator
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a member of a righteous sect. Not only is [PAWN_pronoun] exceptionally powerful, but [PAWN_pronoun] also enjoys helping those weaker than [PAWN_pronoun]. Among the fellow disciples, [PAWN_pronoun] has an excellent reputation.

BackstoryDef.title: Furnaces lover
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] once joined an unorthodox sect called the "Heavenly Society," where the disciples mainly used people of different races as cauldrons. Whenever they wanted to kill or use someone, they had to seek approval from the elders.
